steps: Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 2.4 g H 3 BO 3 Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 1.4 g MnCl 2 *4H 2 O Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 0.4 g ZnCl 2 Zinc dichloride Contributed by users
Add 0.02 g CoCl 2 *6H 2 O Cobaltous chloride hexahydrate Contributed by users
Add 0.1 mg CuCl 2 *2H 2 O Copper (II) chloride dihydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #10125-13-0
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
